list.title: Laboratory Incident Report Registry
list.noTicketsFound: No laboratory incident reports detected in apparatus!
list.searchPlaceholder: Query by Incident Report ID / Subject Classification

view.title: Incident Report {id}
view.subject: Incident Subject Classification
view.emailDisabled: Your electronic correspondence address ({email}) has been suspended. Please contact
view.allowServerAccess: Authorize InterServer to modify experiment chamber:
view.ipHelpText: If the connection originates from a different network node address, please update it accordingly.
view.rootPasswordPlaceholder: Test Subject Container / Dedicated Experiment Chamber
view.passwordEncrypted: Security Access Passphrases are stored in a separate encrypted containment database.
view.ticketClosed: This incident report has been sealed — responses are suspended. If you still require laboratory assistance, please submit a new incident report and our team will be delighted to assist.
view.replyPlaceholder: Detailed laboratory notes regarding the experimental anomaly
view.replyHint: Submitting separate incident reports for distinct anomalies assists our laboratory team in prioritizing and resolving them with greater efficiency.
view.closeConfirmText: Do you want to seal this incident report containment unit?

new.title: Submit New Laboratory Incident Report
new.subject: Incident Subject Classification
new.subjectValidation: Please provide a brief description of the experimental anomaly.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: The laboratory thanks you for maintaining a streamlined incident reporting system by submitting one anomaly per report.
new.descriptionValidation: Please provide a detailed description of the experimental anomaly.
new.fileNote: Protocol Note: Only image files - gif/jpeg/png classification types are permitted.
new.allowAccessLabel: I authorize InterServer to access my experiment chamber and perform modifications
new.accessNote: Please note: By submitting a laboratory support incident report, InterServer technical staff may need to access, diagnose, or modify files in your researcher profile. This requirement is essential for providing technical laboratory support. Please only proceed if you concur.
